_meta.name: Phoenix Omega — FLUX txt2img Manga (H1=A canonical: dev-fp8 / 28 / 3.5 / dpmpp_2m / karras, webtoon vertical)
_meta.description: EmptyLatent + KSampler denoise 1.0. Generator replaces {{positive_prompt}} / {{negative_prompt}}. Uses flux1-dev-fp8 at 28 steps cfg 3.5 dpmpp_2m / karras — H1=A canonical per docs/feedback_campaign_h1_h2_decisions and skills/pearl-int/references/manga_render_path_decision.md. Default dims 1080x1920 = WEBTOON vertical panel; callers may override via per-panel width/height. This is the brand-1 path (the_alarm_is_lying et al). Brand-2 V1 ship still uses schnell — see flux_txt2img_manga_brand2_schnell.json for that path.
_meta.h1a_corrected: PR #807 (2026-04-30) corrected flux_img2img_manga.json and flux_ip_adapter_manga.json to H1=A but missed this file; corrected 2026-06-02 (PR follow-up). flux_txt2img_manga_brand2_schnell.json preserves the schnell config for the brand-2 V1 ship path.

inputs.text: {{negative_prompt}}, text, words, letters, captions, watermark, signature, signs, writing, typography, text characters, font, lettering, logos, subtitles, calligraphy
